case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. TEERAWUTH MANCHUNAKORN ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 (TRANSACTION ID # 60113389) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-03-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANCHUNAKORN, TEERAWUTH AKA T MANCHUNAKORN $10,614.03 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,614.03, SEE SCANNED DOC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MANCHUNAKORN, TEERAWUTH AKA T MANCHUNAKORN

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MANCHUNAKORN, TEERAWUTH AKA T MANCHUNAKORN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2017

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT TEERAWUTH MANCHUNAKORN IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,614.03, PLUS COSTS AS DETERMINED PER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURES. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is granted. Plaintiff is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Teerawuth Manchunakorn in the amount of $10,614.03, plus costs as determined per the memorandum of costs procedures. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
